label: Mailto Contact Form
summary: Instructions-only soft dossier for a contact form that submits via a pre-filled mailto: link rather than a server endpoint. Zero env, zero backend, zero third-party service. Validates client-side and opens the visitor's mail client with subject + body populated from the form fields. The hard alternative — resend-contact-form (server-side delivery via Resend API) — is planned for a future sprint but requires env secrets; this soft dossier is the safe default that works at build time without configuration.
